lines.speaker: Jungle forester
lines.text: Hello friend. You're a long way from Lumbridge!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How do I get into the Kharazi Jungle?

lines.speaker: Jungle forester
lines.text: Well, I don't recommend just walking in! The last guy I saw try that barely escaped with his life.

lines.speaker: Jungle forester
lines.text: Apparently he was on a mission to map the area. How foolish is that?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Actually, I plan to map the jungle myself.

lines.speaker: Jungle forester
lines.text: Oh. Oops. Sorry if I sounded rude, it just seems like a really bad idea.

lines.speaker: Jungle forester
lines.text: I mean it's a noble calling. Lots of people around here could use a proper map to navigate with. But, you know... there's something not quite right about that jungle.

lines.speaker: Jungle forester
lines.text: Best of luck though... Guthix knows, you'll need it.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Do you have any other tips about the Kharazi Jungle?

lines.speaker: Jungle forester
lines.text: Not really. Just be careful - there's a lot of weird stuff going on in there lately.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Are you calling me foolish?

lines.speaker: Jungle forester
lines.text: Er... maybe? I'll just be on my way...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What do you do here?

lines.speaker: Jungle forester
lines.text: I'm a forester, and I specialise in exotic woods. I haven't gone into the Kharazi myself, but I've found some interesting tree specimens out here.

lines.speaker: Jungle forester
lines.text: If you do find a safe path into the jungle, do come and let me know. I'd love to have a nose around in there.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Have you seen any Kharazi tribespeople in the jungle?

lines.speaker: Jungle forester
lines.text: Oh yes, I've met loads of them! Lovely lot. I haven't seen many about recently, though.

lines.speaker: Jungle forester
lines.text: If you're looking to say hello, you'll need a Bullroarer. If you swing it above your head it makes a loud noise - that should attract someone's attention.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Do you have a Bullroarer I could borrow?

lines.speaker: Jungle forester
lines.text: I wish I did! But I just have the one, and I've grown fond of it. Besides, I might need it if I ever get lost in the jungle.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Will you trade something for it?

lines.speaker: Jungle forester
lines.text: Hmm, maybe. Tell you what, you show me something interesting and I'll see if it's worth my Bullroarer. How about that?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: It's a deal!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Okay, thanks.

lines.speaker: Jungle forester
lines.text: You're welcome! See you around...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I have a question about my Achievement Diary.

lines.speaker: Jungle forester
lines.text: Sorry, I don't do that kind of thing any more. You should go and talk to Pirate Jackie in Brimhaven instead.

sections.title: Using items on the jungle forester

lines.speaker: Jungle forester
lines.text: Ugh, it's still raw! You can't serve me that. Take it away!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I lost my Bullroarer, can I swap this delicious wrap for yours?

lines.speaker: Jungle forester
lines.text: Go on then. Forestry is hungry work.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: On second thoughts, I might get hungry.

lines.speaker: Jungle forester
lines.text: Sorry, but I have no use for that.

sections.title: Swinging the bullroarer near the forester

lines.speaker: Jungle forester
lines.text: You'll have better luck getting someone's attention if you use it in the jungle.
